    Your Trusted Technology Partner

    KunTech (Kun Technologies) is a Zimbabwean digital solutions company dedicated to helping businesses succeed through technology. We combine technical expertise with creative thinking to deliver solutions that make a real impact.

    Our Work

    Featured Projects

    E-commerce

    ZimTrade Online Marketplace

    A full-featured e-commerce platform connecting Zimbabwean artisans with global buyers, featuring mobile payment integration and real-time inventory management.

    Web App

    Harare Medical Portal

    A patient management and appointment booking system for a leading medical group, with telemedicine capabilities and electronic health records.

    Branding

    Safari Lodge Brand Identity

    Complete brand redesign for a premium safari lodge, including logo, marketing materials, website, and social media presence.

    Testimonials

    What Our Clients Say

    "KunTech transformed our business with a world-class e-commerce platform. Our online sales increased by 200% within the first six months. Their team is incredibly professional and technically skilled."

    TM
    Tatenda Moyo
    CEO, ZimTrade

    "The brand identity KunTech created for us perfectly captures the essence of our safari experience. We've seen a dramatic increase in direct bookings since the redesign. Outstanding work!"

    SN
    Sarah Ndlovu
    Marketing Director, Matobo Safari Lodge

    "The fleet management system has been a game-changer. We cut fuel costs by 30% and our delivery times have never been better. KunTech understood our needs from day one."

    DC
    David Chikwanha
    Operations Manager, Swift Logistics

    "Our patient management portal has streamlined everything. No-shows dropped by 50%, and patients love the convenience of online booking. KunTech delivered beyond our expectations."

    GM
    Grace Mutasa
    Practice Manager, Harare Medical Group
